arts.ttl: Team news: Leeds squad revealed v Sheff Utd
arts.sum: Leeds United winger duo Dan James and Manor Solomon are available for tonight’s clash with Sheffield United after recent injury issues. LeedsLive have now revealed the squad that is going to face the Blades this evening, looking to end their unbeaten run and move joint-top of the Championship in the process.

arts.ttl: Sheffield United to honour George Baldock before Leeds match
arts.sum: Baldock, who passed away earlier this month, played more than 200 times for the club

arts.ttl: Worrying Daniel Farke record emerges as Leeds United face Sheffield United
arts.sum: Daniel Farke’s Leeds side are looking for automatic promotion this season instead of the playoffs, and they face probably their biggest home test yet in the form of Sheffield United. Leeds United host Sheffield United at Elland Road in the Championship for the first time since 2019, where Marcelo Bielsa lost out on promotion to Chris Wilder and Daniel Farke.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke explains which free agent Leeds United want
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke has claimed that his club would have to enter the free agent market to solve the crisis at the club. The Whites are currently struggling with an injury crisis with both of their defensive midfielders out with injuries and Max Wober is also sidelined and expected to return after a […] The post Daniel Farke explains which free agent Leeds United want appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Patrick Bamford shares story of ex-Liverpool star Fabinho constantly singing Leeds United song
arts.sum: Leeds United striker Patrick Bamford will no doubt be reminiscent of the best season in his career, when he fired in 17 Premier League goals in 20/21, getting his campaign up and running against Liverpool. “So we had Victor Orta, who some Leeds fans gave him stick, but he is honestly one of the best guys, like in football, in terms, of just, he is pure.

arts.ttl: Sheffield United gaffer remaining grounded despite great start to the season: “Don’t get carried away with anything”
arts.sum: Leeds United host Sheffield United on Friday evening, with both teams riding high in the early push for promotion from the Championship. The stakes are significant as both clubs aim to return to the Premier League, and this clash could set the tone for the remainder of the season. arts.sum: He’s been without a club since January, but with 499 career appearances under his belt, free agent, Christoph Kramer, who is believed to have arrived at Leeds United, would likely be a sound addition to the squad. arts.ttl: Leeds United could be about to get horrific £13m transfer reminder later today
arts.sum: Leeds United tried to sign Gustavo Hamer from Sheffield United in August, but came up short with a bid that only succeeded in angering the South Yorkshire club further after previous transfer sagas in the summer. Leeds tried to sign Gustavo Hamer from Sheffield United in £13m bid

arts.ttl: Leeds United could lose another two defenders for selection vs Sheff Utd
arts.sum: Leeds are expected to ensure Baldock is properly remembered on the night before the two teams play their televised match under the lights. This will be the first match Sheffield United have played since the tragic death of former defender George Baldock.
